change.diff_summary: Changed diffusion loss from MSE to L1

jury_reasoning.hypothesis: L1 loss is more robust to outliers and better aligns with MAE evaluation metric.
jury_reasoning.mechanism: Changed both l_diff and l_x0 from F.mse_loss to F.l1_loss in diffusion_loss.

git.commit_message: pipeline: time_series_expert — L1 loss for diffusion pretraining
